hero.subtitle: Manage your tournaments simply and efficiently

createTournament.title: Create your tournament
createTournament.description: Easily configure your tournaments: groups, knockout stages, or both.

managePlayers.title: Manage players
managePlayers.description: Add your participants and organize them into series and groups as needed.

followScores.title: Track scores
followScores.description: Enter results in real time and view rankings updated automatically.

urlAccess.title: URL access
urlAccess.description: Share your tournament simply with a link. No registration required, no personal data.

free.title: 100% free
free.description: Create and organize as many tournaments as you wish, completely free of charge.

openSource.title: Free and open source
openSource.description: Open source code, no ads, no limitations. Play away.

step1.title: Tournament information
step1.name: Tournament name *
step1.descriptionHelp: Markdown format supported (headings, lists, links, bold, italic).

step2.title: Creator information
step2.description: This information will allow you to be identified as the organizer. A unique management link will be assigned to you.
step2.emailInvalid: The email address is not valid.

success.title: Tournament created
success.message: Your tournament is awaiting validation. The administration URL below is shown only once: save it immediately.

error.title: Creation failed
error.message: The tournament was submitted, but the administration link could not be generated.

notFound.title: Tournament not found
notFound.message: This tournament does not exist or has been deleted.

detail.waitingValidation: The administrator must validate this tournament before it can be visible. Thank you for your patience.

dashboard.warningStaleUnscoredGames: {{count}} game(s) started more than one hour ago without a score
dashboard.warningGamesWithoutReferees: {{count}} game(s) in the coming week without referees

admin.denied: Access denied: invalid or expired link.
admin.notFound: Tournament not found or not specified.
admin.validatedDetail: The tournament has been validated and is now in progress.

general.title: General
general.name: Tournament name
general.savedDetail: Tournament information has been saved successfully.

poules.dialogAddTeam: Add a team to the group
poules.removeTeamAria: Remove this team from the group
poules.serieAddedDetail: The series has been successfully added.
poules.serieEditedDetail: The series has been successfully updated.
poules.serieDeletedDetail: The series has been successfully deleted.
poules.pouleAddedDetail: The group has been successfully added.
poules.pouleEditedDetail: The group has been successfully updated.
poules.pouleDeletedDetail: The group has been successfully deleted.
poules.teamAddedDetail: The team has been successfully added to the group.
poules.teamRemovedDetail: The team has been successfully removed from the group.

games.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this game? This action is irreversible.
games.addedDetail: The game has been successfully added.
games.editedDetail: The game has been successfully updated.
games.deletedDetail: The game has been successfully deleted.
games.noGamesForFilters: No games match the selected filters.
games.sameTeamError: Both teams cannot be the same.

teams.addedDetail: The team has been successfully added.
teams.editedDetail: The team has been successfully updated.
teams.deletedDetail: The team has been successfully deleted.

users.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this user?

importExport.exportDescription: Download all tournament data (teams, series, groups, games) in YAML format.
importExport.importDescription: Import a YAML file to restore or replace all tournament data.
importExport.invalidFile: Invalid file. Please select a valid YAML file.
importExport.importConfirmMessage: This action will replace all existing data (teams, series, groups, games). This operation is irreversible.
importExport.importSuccessDetail: The tournament data was imported successfully.
importExport.importErrorDetail: An error occurred during import. Please try again.

deleteTournament.title: Danger zone
deleteTournament.description: Deleting the tournament is irreversible. All data (teams, games, series) and all users will be permanently deleted.
deleteTournament.dialogWarning: This action is irreversible. The tournament and all its data will be permanently deleted.
deleteTournament.errorDetail: An error occurred during deletion. Please try again.

timeSlots.title: Time slots
timeSlots.addedDetail: The time slot has been successfully added.
timeSlots.deletedDetail: The time slot has been successfully deleted.

confirm.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

tournamentHeader.editDetail: Tournament editing will be available soon

finale.regenerateConfirm: Do you want to regenerate matches? Existing matches will be deleted.
finale.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete all playoff matches? This action is irreversible.
finale.sizeUpdatedDetail: The playoff size has been updated.
finale.gamesDeletedDetail: The playoff matches have been deleted.
finale.gameEditedDetail: The playoff match has been updated.
finale.noGames: No matches generated. Configure the size and generate matches.
